name: codex-notifier
description: Notify with sound when work is complete.

codexNotifier.completionUseBanner.description: Show completion/test notifications as banner popups. When false, completion/test use quiet status bar only.

codexNotifier.toastWhenUnfocused.description: On Windows, show system toast notifications when VS Code is not focused.

codexNotifier.popupDurationMs.description: How long the completion status notification stays visible.

codexNotifier.completeSoundPath.description: Absolute path to complete sound file (.wav/.mp3). Leave empty to use bundled notification2.wav.

codexNotifier.errorSoundPath.description: Absolute path to error sound file (.wav/.mp3). Leave empty to use bundled notification1.wav.

codexNotifier.watchEnabled.description: Watch a file trigger and notify when it changes.

codexNotifier.watchFilePath.description: File path to watch. Relative paths are resolved from workspace root.

codexNotifier.monitorCodexChat.description: Monitor Codex chat session documents and notify when response streaming appears complete.

codexNotifier.codexChatIdleMs.description: How long Codex chat document must stay unchanged before complete notification fires.

codexNotifier.codexChatCooldownMs.description: Minimum gap between Codex chat completion notifications.

codexNotifier.codexChatPollMs.description: Polling interval for Codex chat session document activity detection.

codexNotifier.debug.description: Enable debug logging to the Codex Notifier output channel.

codexNotifier.monitorCodexLog.description: Monitor VS Code Codex.log stream activity and notify when streaming goes idle.

codexNotifier.codexLogIdleMs.description: Idle duration after last stream event before complete notification fires.

codexNotifier.codexLogMinEvents.description: Minimum number of stream-state events required before completion notification can fire.

codexNotifier.codexLogMinBurstMs.description: Minimum duration of stream burst required before completion notification can fire.
